paper_title: Quantum Kernels and the Cross-Section of Stock Returns: Anatomy of a Vanishing Advantage
notes: Stage 6 run against a debug smoke-test on synthetic data (real China A-share dataset is proprietary, not released) -- reproducibility_score 0.16 reflects wrong-dataset-and-tiny-sample, not implementation quality. One real bug found and fixed during testing (pandas groupby.apply column-dropping). H_q gate in Eq.1 is the highest-risk unresolved ambiguity.
